race.comment: RECIPROCAL (5) made light work of his rivals when rising sharply in trip second-up at Balaklava. Looks better suited over these staying trips and can keep the ball rolling. LAFONT (9) has been warming nicely late and looks a mare that will relish stepping out to this staying journey fourth-up. Holder's booking signals intent. EVERYTHINGISAUTUMN (8) has been mixing her form but backs up quickly off a solid effort at Murray Bridge and boasts peaks that measure up under this light weight. RIKKI RIKKARDO (15) held off EVERYTHINGISAUTUMN last start but now meets them 2 kg worse off because of the win. Keeping safe. EIGHT ON THE DOT (2) has proven tough to catch but is another that is on the quick back-up and holds figures that can threaten if on song. Not dismissing.
